name: T3-WF-2 invoke allowed
description: Grants the reserved `functions` namespace and instructs the agent to call the capture_event invocation, then emit the result. Version-pinned tier-3 fixture (specs/developing/testing/scenarios.md#T3-WF-2, allowed half).

steps.label: Call the invocation
steps.prompt: Call the capture_event function invocation with { "payload": "{{inputs.payload}}" }. You MUST call it exactly once.

steps.label: Emit the outcome
steps.name: result
steps.prompt: Report whether the capture_event call succeeded and what it returned.
